mapper.sql: userId, orderNo, transactionNumber, payType, money, tradeDate,tradeType,openId, tradeStatus, checkedTime, transactionTime, createdDate
mapper.insert: insert into income_pay_detail( userId, orderNo, payType, money, tradeDate, tradeType, tradeStatus, checkedTime, transactionTime, createdDate ) values ( #{userId}, #{orderNo}, #{payType}, #{money}, #{tradeDate}, #{tradeType}, #{tradeStatus}, #{checkedTime}, #{transactionTime}, #{createdDate} );
mapper.update: update income_pay_detail SET userId=#{userId}, orderNo=#{orderNo}, transactionNumber=#{transactionNumber}, payType=#{payType}, money=#{money}, tradeDate=#{tradeDate}, tradeType=#{tradeType}, openId=#{openId}, tradeStatus=#{tradeStatus}, checkedTime=#{checkedTime}, transactionTime=#{transactionTime}, createdDate=#{createdDate} where incomePayDetailId=#{incomePayDetailId};
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM income_pay_detail WHERE incomePayDetailId IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
/* select sum(money)-(select sum(money) FROM income_pay_detail where payType in (1,8,9) and tradeStatus=3) FROM income_pay_detail where payType in (2,3,4,5,6,7,10,11) and tradeStatus=3 */ select sum(money) FROM income_pay_detail where
payType in (2,3,4,5,6,10,13) and tradeStatus=3 and tradeType in (2,3)
mapper.insert:
insert into income_pay_detail(
) values ( userId, orderNo, transactionNumber, payType, money, tradeDate, tradeType, openId, tradeStatus, checkedTime, transactionTime, createdDate );
mapper.select:
select count(1) from income_pay_detail ipd LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON ui.userId = ipd.userId
payType = 7 and tradeStatus = 3
AND ipd.storeId = #{storeId}
AND ipd.storeId in (${storeIds})
AND ui.nickname LIKE concat('%',trim(#{userName}),'%')
AND ipd.orderNo LIKE concat('%',trim(#{orderNo}),'%')
AND ipd.createdDate BETWEEN #{sdate} AND #{edate}

select count(*) from income_pay_detail ipd INNER JOIN user_info ui ON ui.userId = ipd.userId INNER JOIN store s ON s.storeId = ipd.storeId
payType = 7 and tradeStatus = 3
AND ui.nickname LIKE concat('%',#{userName},'%')
AND ipd.orderNo LIKE concat('%',#{orderNo},'%')
AND s.storeName LIKE concat('%',#{storeName},'%')
AND ipd.createdDate BETWEEN #{sdate} AND #{edate}

select sum(money) FROM income_pay_detail
payType = 7 and tradeStatus = 3
AND storeId = #{storeId}
AND storeId in (${storeIds})

select count(*) from income_pay_detail ipd INNER JOIN user_info ui ON ui.userId = ipd.userId INNER JOIN store s ON s.storeId = ipd.storeId
payType = 12
AND ipd.storeId = #{storeId}
AND ipd.storeId in (${storeIds})
AND ui.nickname LIKE concat('%',#{userName},'%')
AND ipd.orderNo LIKE concat('%',#{orderNo},'%')
AND s.storeName LIKE concat('%',#{storeName},'%')
AND ui.phone LIKE concat('%',#{phone},'%')
AND ipd.createdDate BETWEEN #{sdate} AND #{edate}
mapper.update: UPDATE income_pay_detail SET tradeStatus = #{tradeStatus} WHERE incomePayDetailId = #{incomePayDetailId}
mapper.select:
SELECT count(DISTINCT if(DATE_FORMAT(finishTime, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m') and buyCount = 1, userId, null)) as userMonth, count(DISTINCT if(DATE_FORMAT(finishTime, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m') and buyCount > 1, userId, null)) as payUserMonth, count(DISTINCT if(DATEDIFF(finishTime, NOW()) = 0, userId, null)) as cardToday, sum(if(DATEDIFF(finishTime, NOW()) = 0, realPayment, 0)) as moneyToday, sum(if(DATE_FORMAT(finishTime, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m'), realPayment, 0)) as moneyMonth, sum(realPayment) as moneyTotal FROM card_order
status=4 and storeAddressId = #{storeAddressId} and find_in_set(#{storeAddrIds}, storeAddrIds)

SELECT sum(c.realPayment) as moneyTotal, f.fitCardId, f.cardName, f.autoPay FROM card_order c left join fit_card f on f.fitCardId = c.cardId
c.status=4 and c.storeAddressId = #{storeAddressId} and c.storeAddressId in (${storeAddressIds}) and find_in_set(#{storeAddrIds}, c.storeAddrIds)
AND c.finishTime BETWEEN #{sdate} AND #{edate}
group by f.fitCardId

SELECT
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.finishTime BETWEEN #{sdate} AND #{edate} THEN c.deviceId END) AS newTotal,
COUNT(DISTINCT c.deviceId) AS newTotal,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.status IN (0, 1) AND DATE_FORMAT(d.validityDate, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') THEN d.deviceId END) AS buyTotal, f.fitCardId, f.cardName, c.buyCount FROM card_order c LEFT JOIN fit_card f ON f.fitCardId = c.cardId LEFT JOIN device d ON d.deviceId = c.deviceId
c.status = 4 AND c.storeAddressId = #{storeAddressId} AND c.storeAddressId IN (${storeAddressIds}) AND FIND_IN_SET(#{storeAddrIds}, c.storeAddrIds)
GROUP BY f.fitCardId having buyTotal>0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM income_pay_detail ipd INNER JOIN user_info u ON ipd.userId = u.userId AND u.isDel = 0 CROSS JOIN user_info cur WHERE cur.userId = #{userId} AND cur.isDel = 0 AND ipd.payType IN (2,3,4,5,6,9,10,11,13) AND ipd.tradeStatus = 3 AND ( u.userId = cur.userId OR (IFNULL(cur.phone, '') != '' AND u.phone = cur.phone) OR (IFNULL(cur.openId, '') != '' AND ( u.openId = cur.openId OR u.gzhOpenId = cur.openId OR u.zfbOpenId = cur.openId OR u.wtOpenId = cur.openId)) OR (IFNULL(cur.gzhOpenId, '') != '' AND ( u.openId = cur.gzhOpenId OR u.gzhOpenId = cur.gzhOpenId OR u.zfbOpenId = cur.gzhOpenId OR u.wtOpenId = cur.gzhOpenId)) OR (IFNULL(cur.zfbOpenId, '') != '' AND ( u.openId = cur.zfbOpenId OR u.gzhOpenId = cur.zfbOpenId OR u.zfbOpenId = cur.zfbOpenId OR u.wtOpenId = cur.zfbOpenId)) OR (IFNULL(cur.wtOpenId, '') != '' AND ( u.openId = cur.wtOpenId OR u.gzhOpenId = cur.wtOpenId OR u.zfbOpenId = cur.wtOpenId OR u.wtOpenId = cur.wtOpenId)) )
